title: Project Manager (High Speed Rail) - Egypt
description_raw:
ewi Recruitment are seeking an experienced Project Manager to lead a High Speed Rail programme in Egypt. Based in Cairo, this contract role offers an excellent opportunity for a rail PM with international experience.

Key responsibilities:
- Manage end-to-end delivery of rail infrastructure works across Egypt
- Develop and maintain the project plan and milestone schedule
- Lead stakeholder management across the client and contractor teams
- Maintain the risk register and RAID log throughout the project lifecycle

Requirements:
- 8+ years rail project management experience
- APM PMQ or PRINCE2 Practitioner
- Previous international rail programme experience preferred

Duration: 12 months
Start: September 2026
Location: Cairo, Egypt
